content:
🚀 fasthttp | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Making asynchronous HTTP requests in Python with enhanced logging, type safety, and middleware capabilities.
✨ Key Features: • Simple API with decorators • Beautiful and colorful request/response logging • Async support built on httpx • Type safety with Pydantic support • Support for all HTTP methods
📖 Summary: Fasthttp is a Python library that provides an asynchronous HTTP client with features like expressive logging, route-based requests, and support for HTTP/2. It simplifies making HTTP requests with a clean API, decorators, and middleware for request/response interception.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
